value.found_quote:
Use IAM agent identity
Learn how to use Identity Access Management (IAM) agent identity to provide security and access management features with Agent Platform.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes "IAM agent identity" as a guide under the "Security and performance" section, stating it provides "security and access management features with Agent Platform" — which directly matches the claim. Additionally, the page is marked as "Preview. This feature is subject to the 'Pre-GA Offerings Terms'", indicating the offering is in preview/pre-GA status.
